Description: Move accepted photos into per-day category folders while keeping the Epic 3 filenames unchanged.

Stories.StoryName: Move accepted photos into category folders
Stories.StoryDescription: After classifying a cluster, move all accepted member photos into `dayXX/<category>/` using the existing filenames from Epic 3.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Accepted photos are sorted into per-day category folders and no extra trip-root category view is created.

Stories.StoryDescription: Leave files already located in `rejected` and `not_photo` exactly where they are.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Epic 4 does not move, rename, or classify files from `rejected` or `not_photo`.
